name: Yellow Tomato Preserves
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the tomatoes and prick each one with a fork.
2. Add sugar, 1 sliced lemon, and juice of 1 lemon to the tomatoes.
3. Mix all ingredients together.
4. Tie the mace and ginger root in a thin cloth bag.
5. Add the bag to the tomatoes.
6. Heat slowly and simmer gently until the fruit is transparent.
7. Remove the tomatoes from the pot.
8. Boil syrup until thick.
9. Add the tomatoes back to the pot and heat to boiling.
